capacity.description: The size of the Redis cache instance, represented by a number.

non_ssl_port_enabled.description: Indicates if the non-SSL port should be enabled for Redis cache.

family.description: The family of the SKU to use for the Redis cache.

minimum_tls_version.description: The minimum TLS version required for connections.

name.description: The name of the Redis cache instance.

public_network_access_enabled.description: Determines if public network access is enabled.

shard_count.description: The number of shards to be created on the Redis cluster.

sku_name.description: The SKU name specifying the pricing tier for the Redis cache.

subnet_id.description: The ID of the subnet in which to deploy the Redis cache.

tags.description: A map of tags to assign to the Redis cache resource.

tenant_settings.description: A map of tenant settings for the Redis instance.

zones.description: The availability zones for the Redis cache.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
